description: Create a custom ViewTemplate tiddler named '$:/custom/ui/ViewTemplate/Backlinks' and tag it with '$:/tags/ViewTemplate'. The tiddler must dynamically append a 'Backlinks' section to the bottom of any tiddler that has incoming links. This section should include a heading and a list of clickable links to all referring tiddlers. Ensure the heading and list are completely hidden for tiddlers with no incoming links.
